# Claude Code Adapter

The Claude Code adapter generates native Claude Code assets: the always-on `CLAUDE.md`, subagent definitions, command files, and hook scripts.

::: tip Install as a plugin
To install Velocity directly via Claude Code's plugin manager:

```text
/plugin marketplace add https://github.com/surya-manne/velocity
/plugin install velocity
```

Then run `/velocity-init`. See [Installable Plugins](/adapters/plugins). The adapter below describes the per-repo files `init`/`sync` generate inside an initialized project.
:::

## Generated Files

```
CLAUDE.md                         # Always loaded by Claude Code (max 80 lines)
subagents/
├── engineer.md                   # Engineer subagent
├── architect.md                  # Architect subagent
├── product.md                    # Product subagent
├── security.md                   # Security subagent
├── backend-engineer.md           # Stack-specific subagent
├── messaging-engineer.md         # (if Kafka detected)
└── [... all agents]
commands/
├── velocity-init.md              # /velocity-init
├── velocity-sync.md              # /velocity-sync
├── velocity-validate.md          # /velocity-validate
├── velocity-grill-me.md          # /velocity-grill-me
├── velocity-tdd.md               # /velocity-tdd
├── velocity-loop.md              # /velocity-loop
└── [... all skills]
hooks/
├── pre-tool-use/
│   ├── git-safety.sh
│   ├── secret-scan.sh
│   └── sql-safety.sh
└── post-tool-use/
    └── audit-log.sh
```

## CLAUDE.md — The Always-On Document

Loaded by Claude Code at the start of every session. Maximum 80 lines:

```markdown
# Velocity — Project Context

STACK: TypeScript/Next.js 14/Fastify/PostgreSQL-Prisma/Kafka
CONTEXTS: orders | payments | notifications | identity
CONTEXT_MD: .velocity/context/{context}/CONTEXT.md
STANDARDS: .velocity/project-context/
GUARDRAILS: hooks/ active | read .velocity/guardrails/default.md for rules
AGENTS: subagents/ | use engineer.md for coding | architect.md for design
COMMANDS: commands/ | /velocity-{skill-name}
KNOWLEDGE: .velocity/knowledge-base/

RULES:

- NEVER invent domain terms
- ALWAYS read CONTEXT.md before writing identifiers
- ALWAYS create fresh subagent window per /tdd task
- NEVER bypass guardrail hooks
- ALWAYS run /velocity-validate before PR

NEXT: /velocity-grill-with-docs (brownfield) OR /velocity-grill-me (greenfield)
```

## Subagents

Claude Code supports explicit subagent spawning. Velocity generates a subagent file for each role, which Claude Code loads in a fresh context window:

```markdown
<!-- subagents/engineer.md -->

You are a Senior Software Engineer specialized in:

- TypeScript, Next.js 14, Fastify, PostgreSQL with Prisma, Redis, Kafka
- Test-driven development (Vitest, Supertest, Playwright)
- Domain-Driven Design with bounded contexts

## Session Protocol

1. Read .velocity/project-intelligence/stack.md
2. Read task definition from .velocity/artifacts/tasks/
3. Read relevant CONTEXT.md for the bounded context
4. Read most recent handoff artifact

## Standards

- .velocity/project-context/engineering.md
- .velocity/project-context/testing.md
- CONTEXT.md vocabulary — never invent terms

## Primary Commands

- /velocity-tdd (implementation)
- /velocity-validate (quality gate)
- /velocity-handoff (context reset)
```

## Commands

Claude Code commands map to Velocity skills. Each command is a `SKILL.md` file in the `commands/` directory:

```
/velocity-init        Start fresh workspace bootstrap
/velocity-sync        Delta refresh after stack changes
/velocity-validate    Run pre-PR quality gate
/velocity-grill-me    Greenfield discovery session
/velocity-grill-with-docs  Brownfield discovery session
/velocity-to-prd      Generate product requirement document
/velocity-to-features Break PRD into vertical slices
/velocity-to-tasks    Decompose features into task queue
/velocity-tdd         TDD implementation loop
/velocity-loop        Autonomous task execution
/velocity-handoff     Produce context reset artifact
/velocity-risk-score  Assess change risk
/velocity-audit-trail View audit log
```

## Hook Scripts

Claude Code hooks run as shell scripts. The adapter generates them from guardrail configuration:

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# hooks/pre-tool-use/git-safety.sh
# Generated by Velocity guardrail-factory

TOOL_NAME="$1"
TOOL_INPUT="$2"

# Block force push to main/master
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git push.*(--force|-f).*(main|master)"; then
  echo "BLOCK: Force push to main/master is not permitted."
  echo "Use a feature branch and open a pull request."
  exit 1
fi

# Require branch prefix
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git checkout -b [^(feature|fix|chore|docs)/]"; then
  echo "WARN: Branch names should start with feature/, fix/, chore/, or docs/"
fi
```

## Hook Types

| Hook                          | Trigger           | Purpose              |
| ----------------------------- | ----------------- | -------------------- |
| `pre-tool-use/git-safety.sh`  | Before Bash tool  | Git operation safety |
| `pre-tool-use/secret-scan.sh` | Before Write tool | Credential detection |
| `pre-tool-use/sql-safety.sh`  | Before Bash/Write | SQL safety           |
| `post-tool-use/audit-log.sh`  | After any tool    | Append to audit log  |

## Configuring Claude Code

After running the adapter, Claude Code is fully configured. No additional setup required — Claude Code reads `CLAUDE.md` and `subagents/` automatically.

Verify the setup:

```
What is the stack for this project?
```

Claude Code should answer from `.velocity/project-intelligence/stack.md` without needing to scan the codebase.
